items.content:
About This Role

We are looking for a Revenue Operations Manager to optimize and align our go-to-market systems and processes across sales, marketing, and customer success. You will be the operational backbone of our revenue engine, ensuring clean data, efficient workflows, and accurate reporting.

This is a strategic and tactical role. You will build the dashboards leadership relies on while also getting hands-on with Salesforce configuration, workflow automation, and process improvement.

Responsibilities

  • Administer and optimize Salesforce CRM, including workflows, reports, and integrations
  • Build and maintain revenue dashboards and forecasting models
  • Design and automate lead routing, opportunity management, and handoff processes
  • Ensure data quality and consistency across CRM, marketing automation, and CS platforms
  • Support territory planning, quota setting, and compensation plan administration
  • Analyze funnel metrics and identify bottlenecks in the revenue process

Requirements

  • 4+ years of experience in revenue operations, sales operations, or business operations
  • Strong Salesforce administration skills (Salesforce Admin certification a plus)
  • Experience with marketing automation integration (HubSpot, Marketo)
  • Advanced analytical skills with proficiency in Excel and BI tools
  • Understanding of B2B SaaS sales processes and metrics

Nice to Have

  • Experience with CPQ tools (Salesforce CPQ, DealHub)
  • Knowledge of data enrichment tools (ZoomInfo, Clearbit, Apollo)
  • Experience with integration platforms (Workato, Tray.io, Zapier)
